scripts.format: oxfmt index.html package.json tsconfig.json .oxlintrc.json vite.config.ts vitest.config.ts playwright.config.ts playwright.scale.config.ts playwright.dist.config.ts src tests e2e tools
scripts.format-check: oxfmt --check index.html package.json tsconfig.json .oxlintrc.json vite.config.ts vitest.config.ts playwright.config.ts playwright.scale.config.ts playwright.dist.config.ts src tests e2e tools
scripts.lint: oxlint src tests e2e tools vite.config.ts vitest.config.ts playwright.config.ts playwright.scale.config.ts playwright.dist.config.ts
scripts.check: bun run format-check && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run contract && bun run test && bun run docs && bun run build
